questions.question: Which institution hosts the ‘World Sustainable Development Summit’?
questions.explanation: The Energy and Resources Institute (TERI) hosted the latest edition of the World Sustainable Development Summit (WSDS). Prime Minister Narendra Modi inaugurated the summit, which was based on the theme ‘Towards a Resilient Planet: Ensuring a Sustainable and Equitable Future’. The keynote addresses will be delivered by President of Republic of Guyana Dr Irfaan Ali and Deputy Secretary-General of the UN.

questions.question: Which institution has organised ‘Darkathon -2022’ initiative to find solutions to counter dark-net markets?
questions.explanation: Narcotics Control Bureau (NCB) has organised ‘Darkathon -2022’ initiative to find solutions to counter dark-net markets. The initiative aims at involving students, youth and technical experts to find effective solutions to counter drug trafficking through darknet. NCB is a Law enforcement and intelligence agency under the Ministry of Home Affairs.

questions.question: Which Ministry of India organised the ‘International workshop on combating marine pollution’ with Australia and Singapore?

options.label: A
options.text: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change

questions.explanation: The Government of India, in partnership with the Government of Australia and the Government of Singapore, conducted an international workshop on combating marine pollution focusing on marine plastic debris. The sessions involved panel discussions to encourage discussion amongst participants from East Asia Summit countries. Ministry of Earth Science organised the workshop.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry/Institution organized Global Summit on ‘Reimagining Museums in India’?
questions.explanation: Ministry of Culture organised a two-day Global Summit on ‘Reimagining Museums in India’ in the month of February 2022. The summit was organized under the aegis of Azadi ka Amrit Mahotsav. The online summit will encompass four broad themes: Architecture and Functional Needs, Management, Collections (including Curation and Conservation practices) and Education and Audience Engagement.

questions.question: National Institute of Career Services (NICS) functions under which Ministry?

options.label: A
options.text: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

questions.explanation: A career counselling workshop ‘Pramarsh 2022’ was launched for over one lakh students of the Bikaner District region. It was conducted with the support of The National Institute of Career Services (NICS) which functions under the Ministry of Labour and Employment. Directorate of Education, Rajasthan also extended support for the workshop.

questions.question: Which South American country has been hit by torrential rains resulting in deadly floods and landslides?
questions.explanation: Brazil has been hit by heavy rains since December that have caused a series of deadly floods and landslides. Recently, extremely heavy rains set off mudslides and floods in a mountainous region of Rio de Janeiro state, especially the city of Petropolis, killing dozens of people. The rainy season downpours are being augmented by La Nina and the impact of climate change.

questions.question: Which Ministry organised the ‘Labharthiyon Se Rubaroo’ initiative?

options.label: B
options.text: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

options.label: C
options.text: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

answer.label: B
answer.text: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

questions.explanation: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs (MoHUA) organised the ‘Labharthiyon Se Rubaroo’ initiative. It was launched to monitor progress of projects under the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Urban (PMAY-U) by directly interacting with beneficiaries. Recently the Secretary of MoHUA, interacted with PMAY(U) beneficiaries from Assam, Jharkhand and Kerala, to know about their experiences under the scheme.

questions.question: As per Hurun Report, by how much % the number of Dollar millionaires in India has risen at the end of pandemic in 2021?
questions.explanation: As per the recently released Hurun Report, the number of Dollar millionaires in India have increased by 11% at the end of 2021, with current numbers at 4.58 lakh. The report has also stated that the number of such Dollar millionaires who consider themselves happy in personal and professional life has come down to 66%. Individuals who possess a personal wealth of over Rs 7 crore are called Dollar millionaires.

questions.question: What is the theme of the ‘World Day of Social Justice’ 2022?

options.label: A
options.text: Achieving Social Justice through Formal Employment

options.label: B
options.text: Achieving Social Justice through Equal Pay

options.label: C
options.text: Achieving Social Justice through Equal Opportunities

answer.label: A
answer.text: Achieving Social Justice through Formal Employment

questions.explanation: ‘World Day of Social Justice’ is observed on February 20 every year. The main objective of celebrating ‘World Day of Social Justice’ is to raise a voice against social injustice and to bring various communities together to eliminate poverty, discrimination, illiteracy, to make a socially integrated society The theme for World Justice Day 2022 is ‘Achieving Social Justice through Formal Employment’.

questions.question: Which country recently flagged off 100 drones, to be used for spraying pesticides in farms?
questions.explanation: In a special drive conducted to help farmers, Indian Prime minister Narendra Modi flagged off 100 Kisan drones in different cities and towns to spray pesticides in farms across the country. The Union Budget 2022-23 announced that the Centre will promote Kisan Drones, chemical-free natural farming, public-private partnerships for the delivery of digital and high-tech services to farmers across the country.
